R.title: Section R — Direct operational evidence cells (added Round-3 in response to reviewer)
R.description: Each cell in this section is a direct, raw before/after operational assertion against a TEST_T303_R3_* fixture, providing one-to-one proof for an acceptance bullet that previously rolled up under broader cells. Every cell carries `observed` + `expected` blocks; the per-cell evidence files under cells/R*.json hold the raw numbers.

cells.name: Sortie DELETE → 30-day currency recompute (cross-PC visibility via polling)
NOTAM expiry: dashboard surfaces all rows; expiry field absent from schema
Manual refresh wired (refetch / invalidateQueries) on dashboard pages
30/90-day window arithmetic matches fixture counts exactly
Role/page action validation: forbidden mutation rejected at policy layer
Closed-month immutability: UPDATE and DELETE blocked while month closed
Squadron rename propagates into xpc_registry.squadron_name
Forwarder remains in chain_pc_ids after handoff (schema; visibility blocked by Family #1)
